title: kaempferia undulata
intro: Kaempferia undulata, also known as Krachai Dam, is a type of plant that belongs to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Kaempferia undulata include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Kaempferia undulata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis and digestive issues.
